markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the AI content strategy for the upcoming campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AI Content Strategy:** A new content cluster will support the February AI campaign. The strategy is awareness-focused, using short-form SEO blogs to funnel traffic to the central "Navan Intelligence" page.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Messaging Source:** The "T\&E AI Product Messaging" doc is the single source of truth for all campaign content, ensuring consistent language and positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**Performance Baseline:** Early Looker data shows positive indexing and ranking signals. Aida will share case studies to set expectations for the typical 6-week ramp-up period for new content.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Insights:** The "Check That" platform reveals a key content gap: Navan lacks a dedicated blog for the high-value keyword "travel and expense management software," which is frequently cited by LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)

## Topics

### AI Content Strategy & Campaign Support

  - [Josh Trach (PMM, Expense & Implement) joined to align on content for the "Navan C\&E AI campaign," launching in the second week of February.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**Campaign Goal:** Drive awareness and funnel traffic to the central "Navan Intelligence" webpage.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [Create short, SEO-friendly blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [Link all blogs to the "Navan Intelligence" page.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [Repurpose content from existing persona blogs ("AI for Finance," "AI for Travel Managers") to maintain consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [**Messaging Source:** The "T\&E AI Product Messaging" doc is the definitive source for all campaign language.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**Inputs:** Aida will use the messaging doc and Moran's existing AI keyword research to generate new topics.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

### Content Performance & Looker Dashboard

  - [Aida reviewed the Looker dashboard, which combines GA4 and GSC data to track content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Key Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**GA4:** Sessions, engagement rate (opposite of bounce rate).](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**GSC:** Clicks, impressions, CTR, average keyword position.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [**Performance Context:**](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
      - [Early data shows positive indexing and ranking signals.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
      - [Traffic ramps up after \~6 weeks of consistent publishing (5 blogs/week).](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Competitive blogs, which drive significant traffic, are awaiting legal approval.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [**Keyword Data:** The dashboard shows URL performance, not individual keywords. Aida can pull keyword data from SEMrush or GSC on request.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

### AI Visibility with "Check That" Platform

  - [Aida demoed "Check That," GrowthX's platform for tracking AI visibility in LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [**Platform Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
      - [**Competitive Benchmarking:** Tracks 1,500+ companies and 100k+ prompts, providing historical data.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
      - [**Prompt Analysis:** Tracks visibility and citation rate for 201 prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
      - [**Source Identification:** Reveals top-cited URLs, identifying content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [**Key Finding:** Navan lacks a dedicated blog for "travel and expense management software," a keyword frequently cited by LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [**Access:** Currently GrowthX-only; client access is a high-priority feature in development.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research using the AI messaging doc and Moran's list.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [Propose 5 new AI-related topics by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [Update internal artifacts (matrix, guidelines) with AI messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
      - [Share the list of prompts tracked in "Check That."](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
      - [Share case studies to set traffic expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [**Josh:**](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [Share the "Navan Intelligence" page link and the "AI for Travel Managers" blog link in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [**Rich & Libby:**](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
      - [Expedite legal review of competitive blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/gz_Gcn8VUbQe1ZQZJtsDcoseR6xXd_Ti?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
